footer.description: Helping businesses become more professional, efficient, and successful through modern websites and intelligent automation.

home.val_eng_desc: Modern tech stacks, lightning-fast performance, and scalable architectures built to industry standards.
home.val_ai_desc: Streamline operations with custom CRM integrations, automated workflows, and intelligent business tools.
home.val_growth_desc: Every digital product we build is optimized for conversion, SEO, and measurable business growth.
home.srv_desc: Tailored digital solutions designed for professional service providers, retail businesses, and modern enterprises.
home.trust_q_desc: Built to the highest technical standards.
home.trust_s_desc: Architectures that grow with your business.
home.about_p1: At Zetta, we specialize in building intelligent, scalable, and high-performance digital products. We treat code as craft and design as strategy.
home.about_p2: From complex enterprise architectures to sleek consumer interfaces, our team is dedicated to crafting software that is deeply impactful and secure by design.
home.cta_title: Ready to elevate your digital presence?
home.phase2_desc: Automate your success with intelligent systems that think, learn, and scale for you.
home.phase3_title: Digital Architecture: Precision down to the kerning.
home.phase3_desc: We build interfaces that don't just work, but fascinate. Design meets uncompromising performance.
